title: Peral Predication
description: This mod is a client-side Fabric mod that shows a live ender pearl prediction while you’re holding a pearl. It draws the expected throw path, marks the likely landing spot, and lets you toggle the preview on or off with a custom keybind.
body: To use it, hold an ender pearl in either hand and the prediction will appear automatically if the feature is enabled. You can press the toggle key, which defaults to V, to turn the preview on or off. If you want to change that key in game, open Esc -> Options -> Pearl Preview and set the toggle key there.
